activity.intimate-hospitalisation: You intimated the TPA that you would be hospitalised.
activity.doctor-signs-admission-advice: The doctor signed the admission advice.
activity.cashless-eligibility-confirmed: The TPA confirmed you are eligible for cashless treatment.
activity.pre-auth-filed: The hospital filed the pre-authorisation request with the TPA.
activity.patient-discharged: You were discharged from the hospital.
activity.discharge-bill-finalised: The hospital finalised the discharge bill.
activity.claim-settled: The TPA settled the claim with the hospital.
activity.query-raised: The TPA raised a query and asked the hospital to clarify.
activity.query-resolved: The hospital answered the TPA's query.
